name: modis_lst_mod11c3_006_night_annual_mean
title: Annual nighttime land surface temperature - MODIS v6.0
description: Annual nighttime land surface temperature in Kelvins. Created by aggregating (mean) month data from MOD11C3.006 CMG LST product

processing_options.description: maximum land surface temperature value per unit of analysis
average land surface temperature value per unit of analysis
minimum land surface temperature value per unit of analysis

citation: Wan, Z., Hook, S., Hulley, G. (2015). MOD11C3 MODIS/Terra Land Surface Temperature/Emissivity Monthly L3 Global 0.05Deg CMG V006 [Data set]. NASA EOSDIS LP DAAC. doi: 10.5067/MODIS/MOD11C3.006
sources_name: Land Processes Distributed Active Archive Center
